recommendations.title: We Need to Talk About Kevin
recommendations.overview: After her son Kevin commits a horrific act, troubled mother Eva reflects on her complicated relationship with her disturbed son as he grew from a toddler into a teenager.

recommendations.title: You Were Never Really Here
recommendations.overview: A traumatized veteran, unafraid of violence, tracks down missing girls for a living. When a job spins out of control, his nightmares begin to overtake him, and a conspiracy is uncovered—leading to what may be his death trip or his awakening.

recommendations.title: Ratcatcher
recommendations.overview: James Gillespie is 12 years old. The world he knew is changing. Haunted by a secret, he has become a stranger in his own family. He is drawn to the canal where he creates a world of his own. He finds an awkward tenderness with Margaret Anne, a vulner

recommendations.title: Die My Love
recommendations.overview: After inheriting a remote Montana house, Jackson moves there from New York with his partner Grace, and the couple soon welcome a child. As Jackson becomes increasingly absent and rural isolation sets in, Grace struggles with loneliness, creative frus

recommendations.title: Nocturnal Animals
recommendations.overview: Susan Morrow receives a book manuscript from her ex-husband – a man she left 20 years earlier – asking for her opinion of his writing. As she reads, she is drawn into the fictional life of Tony Hastings, a mathematics professor whose family vacation

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Colonia
recommendations.overview: A young woman's desperate search for her abducted boyfriend draws her into the infamous Colonia Dignidad, a sect nobody ever escaped from.

recommendations.title: Bodyguards and Assassins
recommendations.overview: In 1905, revolutionist Sun Yat-Sen visits Hong Kong to discuss plans with Tongmenghui members to overthrow the Qing dynasty. But when they find out that assassins have been sent to kill him, they assemble a group of protectors to prevent any attacks.

recommendations.title: Ugly, Dirty and Bad

recommendations.title: Nights of Cabiria
